title: The Missing Sister
content:
Lin Hao slammed the door to his apartment shut, his fists clenched in anger. The note on the table burned in his mind - his sister Lin Xue was gone, taken by someone or something he couldn't see.

"Xue'er..." he whispered, staring at the empty chair where she usually sat. The apartment felt cold without her presence, without her laughter echoing through the rooms.
